testCases: TC1: input { param1: 10, param2: 2, param3: "weapon", param4: true } → output { total: 60, breakdown: { attack: 10, speed: 2, type: "weapon", typeMultiplier: 2, critical: true, criticalMultiplier: 1.5, baseDPS: 20, adjustedDPS: 40, powerScore: 60 } }

TC2: input { param1: 5, param2: 1.5, param3: "armor", param4: false } → output { total: 3.75, breakdown: { attack: 5, speed: 1.5, type: "armor", typeMultiplier: 0.5, critical: false, criticalMultiplier: 1, baseDPS: 7.5, adjustedDPS: 3.75, powerScore: 3.75 } }

TC3: input { param1: 20, param2: 1.2, param3: "accessory", param4: true } → output { total: 36, breakdown: { attack: 20, speed: 1.2, type: "accessory", typeMultiplier: 1, critical: true, criticalMultiplier: 1.5, baseDPS: 24, adjustedDPS: 24, powerScore: 36 } }
TC4: input { param1: 1000, param2: 0.5, param3: "weapon", param4: false } → output { total: 1000, breakdown: ... }
TC5: input { param1: 7.5, param2: 1.3, param3: "accessory", param4: false } → output { total: 9.75, breakdown: ... }
TC6: input { param1: -5, param2: 2, param3: "weapon", param4: false } → output { error: "Attack must be > 0." }
TC7: input { param1: 0, param2: 2, param3: "weapon", param4: false } → output { error: "Attack must be > 0." }
TC8: input { param1: 10, param2: -1, param3: "weapon", param4: false } → output { error: "Speed must be > 0." }
TC9: input { param1: "abc", param2: 2, param3: "weapon", param4: false } → output { error: "Attack must be a number." }
TC10: input { param1: 10, param2: "", param3: "weapon", param4: false } → output { error: "Speed must be a number." }
TC11: input { param1: 10, param2: 2, param3: "potion", param4: false } → output { error: "Invalid item type. Must be weapon, armor, or accessory." }
TC12: input { param1: 10, param2: 2, param3: null, param4: false } → output { error: "Item type is required." }
TC13: input { param1: 10, param2: 2, param3: "weapon" } (param4 omitted) → output { total: 40, breakdown: { ..., critical: false, criticalMultiplier: 1, ... } }
TC14: input { param1: 10, param2: 2, param3: "weapon", param4: "yes" } → output { error: "Toggle must be a boolean." }
TC15: input { param1: NaN, param2: 2, param3: "weapon", param4: false } → output { error: "Attack must be a number." }
TC16: input { param1: 10, param2: Infinity, param3: "weapon", param4: false } → output { error: "Speed must be a finite number." }
TC17: input { param1: 10, param2: 2, param3: "  weapon  ", param4: false } → output { total: 40, ... } (whitespace trimmed)
TC18: input { param1: 10, param2: 2, param3: "", param4: false } → output { error: "Item type is required." }
TC19: input { param1: 0.001, param2: 0.002, param3: "weapon", param4: true } → output { total: 0.000006, ... }
TC20: calculator.formatCurrency(123.456) → "$123.46"
